Rollover waiver matrix

Rollover waiver summary

Rollover waiver matrix

Rollover waiver matrices matter when operators need a compact map of which rollover requests can bypass a normal eligibility gate during constrained recovery windows.

The matrix ties waiver tiers to grace thresholds, fallback regions, and the dashboard checks required before another rollover cycle is granted.

It also makes clear where shared throughput stability overrides local waiver requests.

Related limit guides
